check_content_excerpt: Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Turn off routine remediation is set to "Disabled"; otherwise, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Turn off routine remediation to "Disabled".

Click "OK".

Click "Apply".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must enable routine remediation.
